name: agent-lens
description: Visualize, intercept, and branch AI agent reasoning in real-time. The Git for AI Agents.

install.setup: import { createPlugin } from '@agent-lens/openclaw-plugin'; export default { plugins: [createPlugin()] };

features.name: Approval Gate
features.description: Pause high-risk tool calls for human review before execution

features.name: Time-Travel Branching
features.description: Fork agent reasoning at any point, compare alternate timelines

features.name: Inference Economics
features.description: Real-time per-span USD cost tracking with cumulative display

features.name: Multimodal Viewer
features.description: Inline rendering of screenshots, images, video, and sensor data

features.name: OTel 1.37+ Export
features.description: Full GenAI Semantic Conventions compliance with OTLP export
